programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the sixth stage of this year's race, a 186.2km route from Pau to Gavarnie-Gedre. Ireland's Ben Healy won his first ever stage at this point last year after he finished first in a stage that saw the cyclists ride 201.5km from Bayeux to Vire Normandie. The Irishman's victory at this point moved him up to eighth in the overall general classification.
